titleStmt.title: SII 17.676: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 676. (A.R. No. 620 of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the wall of the Vēdavallittāyār shrine in the Vēdanārāyaṇasvāmin temple.
The details of the date, viz., Pramāthin, Chittirai 28 are insufficient for verification. The cyclic year, however will correspond to 1579 A.D.

This inscription records that certain honours like paraḍai and parivaṭṭam had been cancelled and instead, the pañchāḷattār will continue to enjoy their traditional rights in return for cultivation and service in the temple. This arrangement is stated to have been made by Śekaturaḍḍi Krishṉamanāyaka, the agent of Śrīraṅga, the tāṉattar and the ūravar of Nāgalāpuram.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
piṟamāti varuṣam cittirai
mātam 2 10 8 2 śrīmaṉ makā
(makā)maṇṭaleśvara rācāti
rāca rācaparameśvara śrī virapiṟa
tāparāna śrīraṅkatevamakā
rāyar kāriyattukku kaṟta
rāṉa cekaturaṭṭi kiṣṇa
maṉāyakkarum nākalā
puram stāṉattārum Ū
r(ā)varum nākalāpuram
pañcāḷattāṟku sāsa
ṉam kuṭuttapaṭi taṅkaḷukku
paraṭai parivaṭṭam veṇṭā
meṉṟu kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉom
tāṅkaḷ Ūril Uṇṭā
ṉa Uḻavu toḻilum tiruk
koyil Ūḻiyamum
paṇṇikkoṇṭu Irukka ka
ṭavarākavum taṅkaḷukku pūṟva
m Uṇṭāṉa māṉṉiyam cu
tantiram naṭattivara kaṭavo
mākavum yintapaṭikku ca
ntirātittavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavo
mākavum yitukku yātoruvar Akutam paṇṇinālum
kaṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvai
koṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavo
mākavum yintapaṭikku stalakaṇakku veṅkap paṉ Eḻuttu stānam cinivācaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.676 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
